questions.question_text: Coffee plants are 'sensitive' to their environment. What does 'sensitive' mean in this context?

options.text: Able to grow strongly in any climate or soil condition
Easily affected or harmed by slight changes in conditions
Resistant to disease and able to survive in harsh conditions
Producing unusually large amounts of fruit in good seasons

questions.explanation_ar: sensitive تعني حساس للتغيرات، أي أن الشيء يتأثر بسهولة بأي تغيير طفيف في الظروف المحيطة به.

questions.question_text: Coffee requires careful 'cultivation' from seed to harvest. What does 'cultivation' mean?

options.text: The global trading of agricultural products across different countries
The scientific study of plant diseases and how to treat them
The process of preparing land and growing plants to produce food
The transportation and packaging of products to international markets

questions.explanation_ar: cultivation تعني زراعة وتربية النباتات، أي عملية إعداد الأرض وتهيئة الظروف المناسبة لزراعة المحاصيل وحصادها.

questions.question_text: Altitude plays a 'crucial' role in determining coffee quality. What does 'crucial' mean?

options.text: A minor role that has very little effect on the final result
An extremely important and decisive role that cannot be ignored
An indirect role that only affects a very small part of the outcome
A negative role that reduces the overall quality of the product

questions.explanation_ar: crucial تعني بالغ الأهمية وحاسم، أي أن العامل لا غنى عنه ويؤثر تأثيراً كبيراً في النتيجة النهائية.

questions.question_text: High-altitude coffee beans 'acquire' complex flavors that experts prize highly. What does 'acquire' mean?

options.text: To lose qualities that were present at an earlier stage
To gain or develop something gradually over time
To maintain exactly the same qualities from beginning to end
To reject qualities that do not match a desired standard

questions.explanation_ar: acquire تعني يكتسب ويطوّر، أي الحصول على خاصية أو صفة جديدة بشكل تدريجي مع مرور الوقت.

questions.question_text: Ethiopian farmers 'maintain' traditional growing methods passed down through generations. What does 'maintain' mean?

options.text: To abandon old practices and replace them with modern techniques
To keep something in good condition and continue using it consistently
To experiment with new methods and change practices regularly
To document and record information about traditional practices

questions.explanation_ar: maintain تعني يحافظ على ويستمر في استخدام، أي إبقاء شيء ما في حالته الأصلية دون تغيير أو إهمال.

questions.question_text: When coffee 'spread throughout' the Ottoman Empire, it means coffee reached and became common across the entire empire.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. spread throughout تعني ينتشر في جميع أنحاء، أي أن شيئاً ما أصبح منتشراً وشائعاً في كل أرجاء منطقة ما.

questions.question_text: When a processing method is 'prevalent' in Central America, it means that method is extremely rare and barely used there.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. prevalent تعني سائد وشائع، أي أن الشيء منتشر على نطاق واسع في منطقة ما وليس نادراً أو غير مستخدَم.

questions.question_text: Farmers must _____ to proper drying techniques to ensure the final coffee has the best possible flavor.
questions.explanation_ar: adhere تعني يلتزم بـ ويتّبع، أي الالتزام الصارم بالتعليمات أو الأساليب المحددة لضمان الحصول على النتيجة المطلوبة.

questions.question_text: Which sentence correctly uses the present passive with a 'by' phrase?

options.text: Coffee is exported by Ethiopia to countries around the world.
Coffee exports by Ethiopia to countries around the world.
Ethiopia exports is coffee to countries around the world.
Coffee are exported by Ethiopia to countries around the world.

questions.explanation_ar: المبني للمجهول مع by يُكوَّن بـ is/are + تصريف ثالث + by + الفاعل الأصلي. الخيار a صحيح، بينما الخيار d يخطئ في استخدام are مع مفرد.

questions.question_text: How do you form a present passive question: 'Is coffee _____ in Brazil?'

options.text: grow
grows
grown
growing

questions.explanation_ar: في سؤال المبني للمجهول للمضارع: Is/Are + subject + past participle (تصريف ثالث)? المضارع التام grow → grown.

questions.question_text: Which sentence converts 'People know coffee for its stimulating effects' correctly into the passive?

options.text: Coffee knows people for its stimulating effects.
Coffee is known for its stimulating effects.
Coffee known for its stimulating effects.
Coffee is know for its stimulating effects.

questions.explanation_ar: التعبير الشائع 'is known for' هو صيغة مبني للمجهول تُستخدم حين لا يكون الفاعل محدداً أو مهماً للمعنى.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses the passive correctly to describe a process where the doer is unimportant?

options.text: Workers pick coffee cherries when they reach full ripeness.
Somebody processes coffee beans at a facility.
Coffee cherries are picked when they reach full ripeness.
The cherries pick themselves at full ripeness.

questions.explanation_ar: نستخدم المبني للمجهول حين لا يكون الفاعل مهماً أو معروفاً. الخيار c لا يذكر الفاعل ويُركّز على عملية القطف ذاتها.

questions.question_text: 'The coffee beans are washed and dried before they are shipped to roasteries worldwide' uses the present passive correctly.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. are washed، are dried، وare shipped جميعها صيغ مبني للمجهول صحيحة (are + تصريف ثالث) تُركّز على عملية التجهيز وليس على القائمين بها.

questions.question_text: Match each passive sentence to the main reason it uses the passive voice.

left_items: Coffee is grown in over 70 countries worldwide.
The best beans are selected by expert tasters.
Espresso machines are used in most cafés.
The coffee is then roasted to bring out its flavour.
right_items: to emphasise the action and its result, not who does it
to mention the doer with 'by' as important information
to state a general fact without specifying who is responsible
to describe a widespread tool or method in common use

correct_answer.left: Coffee is grown in over 70 countries worldwide.
correct_answer.right: to state a general fact without specifying who is responsible

correct_answer.left: The best beans are selected by expert tasters.
correct_answer.right: to mention the doer with 'by' as important information

correct_answer.left: Espresso machines are used in most cafés.
correct_answer.right: to describe a widespread tool or method in common use

correct_answer.left: The coffee is then roasted to bring out its flavour.
correct_answer.right: to emphasise the action and its result, not who does it

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم المبني للمجهول لأسباب متعددة: إخفاء الفاعل، الإشارة إليه بـ by، وصف أدوات شائعة، أو التركيز على النتيجة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, where is the 'coffee belt' located geographically?

options.text: Between 40 degrees north and 50 degrees south latitude
Between 25 degrees north and 30 degrees south latitude
Only in countries at exactly zero degrees on the equator
Between 10 degrees north and 15 degrees south latitude

questions.explanation_ar: حدّد النص حزام القهوة بأنه شريط ضيق حول خط الاستواء يمتد بين 25 درجة شمالاً و30 درجة جنوباً.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what is special about Ethiopian coffee farmers' knowledge of their beans?

options.text: They use modern technology to analyse the chemical composition of beans
They can identify beans from different hillsides simply by tasting them
They have developed a new variety that grows at sea level
They are the only farmers who sell directly to international buyers

questions.explanation_ar: أفاد النص أن مزارعي إثيوبيا يحافظون على الأساليب التقليدية الموروثة، ويستطيعون التمييز بين حبوب القهوة من تلال مختلفة بمجرد التذوق.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, what are the key characteristics of coffee produced using the wet processing method?

options.text: Fuller body and fruity characteristics due to sun drying
Bright acidity and clean flavors from fermentation in water
Mild flavor with low acidity from slow mountain drying
Intense bitterness from the use of high-temperature processing

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص أن طريقة المعالجة الرطبة تُنتج قهوة ذات حموضة مشرقة ونكهات نظيفة نتيجة لتخمير الحبوب في الماء لمدة 12-48 ساعة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, beans grown at higher altitudes between 1,200 and 2,000 meters develop more slowly and acquire complex flavors.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. أكد النص أن الارتفاع يؤدي إلى نمو بطيء للحبوب، مما يسمح لها باكتساب نكهات أكثر تعقيداً يُقدّرها خبراء القهوة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, the coffee belt extends between 25 degrees north and _____ degrees south latitude.
questions.explanation_ar: حدّد النص حزام القهوة بأنه يمتد بين 25 درجة شمالاً و30 درجة جنوباً خط الاستواء.

questions.question_text: Match each coffee processing method or factor from Passage B to its characteristic outcome.

right_items: can increase farmer income by 200-300% compared to conventional chains
produces beans with fuller body and fruity characteristics
results in bright acidity and clean flavors
leads to more complex flavors due to slow development

correct_answer.right: results in bright acidity and clean flavors
produces beans with fuller body and fruity characteristics
leads to more complex flavors due to slow development
can increase farmer income by 200-300% compared to conventional chains

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص خصائص كل عامل: المعالجة الرطبة (حموضة وصفاء)، الجفاف (قوام كامل وفاكهي)، الارتفاع (تعقيد النكهات)، والتجارة المباشرة (زيادة دخل المزارعين).
